manual_entries.title: Guoxiang Clean Heat Exchange Fins
manual_entries.summary: Keep the heat exchange fins clean and wash them regularly when blockage is severe.

steps: Inspect the heat exchange fins for severe blockage
Clean the heat exchange fins regularly

doc.file_name: Guoxiang KMS Modular Unit User Manual.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: When fin blockage is severe, keep the heat exchange fins clean and wash them regularly.
chunk.text_excerpt: keep heat exchange fins clean and wash regularly

evidence.evidence_text: 散热盘管铝片被堵塞严重（制冷） 保持散热盘管清洁，请定期清洗

manual_entries.title: Guoxiang Check Water Flow and Vent Air
manual_entries.summary: Increase water flow and vent trapped air after low-pressure trip conditions.

structured_payload.step: Increase water flow and vent trapped air from the water circuit

doc.file_name: Guoxiang KMS Modular Unit User Manual.pdf

chunk.cleaned_text: Check the cause, increase water flow, and vent air from the water path.
chunk.text_excerpt: increase water flow and vent air

evidence.evidence_text: 检查原因，增大水流量 打开水路排气阀排除空气
